overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a sunny urban neighborhood, stopping at a busy intersection to wait for traffic, crossing the street, and continuing along the sidewalk past residential homes and a fast-food restaurant.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with Victorian houses and utility poles

events.description: blue sedan drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked concrete sidewalk past Victorian houses

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story gray house with gabled roof and front porch
tall wooden telephone pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
white rectangular traffic sign indicating speed limit 30
standard blue USPS mailbox on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cracked concrete sidewalk lined with Victorian houses on the right and a street with sparse traffic on the left. Utility poles and a speed limit sign are visible as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with fast food restaurant and traffic signals

events.description: character stops at street corner to wait for traffic
character begins crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waits at the corner for vehicles to pass, then walks across the crosswalk to the opposite side

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab stopped at the intersection
police cruiser driving through the intersection

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with distinctive red roof and large rotating burger sign
broad white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
yellow traffic signal suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a busy intersection corner, waiting for traffic including a yellow taxi and police car to pass. The Burger Shot restaurant is visible across the street. After waiting, the character crosses the street via the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial and residential sidewalk with stone retaining walls

events.description: motorcycle drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the sidewalk past the Burger Shot and residential properties

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in striped shirt walking in the opposite direction toward the camera

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
ornate black street lamp on concrete pedestal
real estate sign posted in front of house

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk bordered by a stone retaining wall. The Burger Shot recedes into the distance as the character passes street lamps and encounters a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban neighborhood as a character navigates from a residential street across a busy intersection. It begins with the character walking along a cracked concrete sidewalk lined with Victorian houses and utility poles. As the character reaches a corner, the scene shifts to a bustling intersection where they pause for a yellow taxi and a police car to pass before crossing the street toward a Burger Shot restaurant. The camera then follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, moving past a stone retaining wall and street lamps. Finally, the Burger Shot recedes into the distance as the character continues forward, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.
